headline: Liverpool Rebuff Inter's Second Jones Offer
body: Liverpool have rejected Inter Milan's second offer of approximately £21 million for midfielder Curtis Jones, expressing frustration at the low valuation.
text:
Liverpool irritated by Inter Milan’s latest lowball offer for Curtis Jones (€25m/£21.6m) and don’t think they are being serious given midfield market this summer. thetimes.com/sport/football/…

Link



Liverpool rebuff Inter Milan’s second offer of £21m for Curtis Jones

Anfield hierarchy values Jones at £35million and is growing increasingly frustrated by Serie A champions’ attempts to get midfielder for significantly less
thetimes.com
